title: hieracium bastrerianum subsp. bastrerianum
intro: Hieracium bastrerianum subsp. bastrerianum is a subspecies of the Hieracium bastrerianum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium bastrerianum subsp. bastrerianum include its ability to support gut health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers to make teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
